Headline: #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park Temporar yNorthbound Reroute near 59th/University
ShortDescription: Northobund 171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park  buses are temporarily rerouted via 59th, Woodlawn and 55th: due to, street blockage near 59th/University.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northobund #171 U. of Chicago/Hyde Park  buses are temporarily rerouted via 59th, Woodlawn and 55th: due to, street blockage near 59th/University.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #15 Jeffrey Local and #J14 Jeffrey Jump Temporary Reroute near Jeffrey/73rd
ShortDescription: 15 Jeffrey Local and J14 Jeffrey Jump buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near Jeffrey/73rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#15 Jeffrey Local and #J14 Jeffrey Jump buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near Jeffrey/73rd.

Northbound #15 Jeffery buses are temporarily rerouted via  Jeffery, 73rd, Stony Island, 67th, and Jeffery, and over to normal route.

Southbound #J14 Jeffery Jump are temporarily rerouted via  Jeffery, 67th , Stony Island, 73rd, Jeffery and over to normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Orange Line Service Delayed near Ashland
ShortDescription: Orange Line trains are standing near the area of Ashland due to fire department activity. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orange Line trains are standing near the area of Ashland due to fire department activity. 

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines. These may include these buses:

  • #9 Ashland
  • #62 Archer

As a result of the delay, shuttle buses are available to provide connecting service between Adams/ Wabash to Midway in both directions.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
